title: Senior Frontend Engineer
description: Partner with founders, agencies, and product teams to ship production React, Next.js, Astro, Craft CMS, and Sanity web products with maintainable frontend architecture
Developed kacet.com from concept to production using React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Vite, TanStack tools, Supabase, and Vercel, driving the marketplace product to a deployable MVP
Built content-heavy catalog and marketing platforms with reusable components, editorial workflows, SEO-ready structure, and pragmatic design system patterns
Implemented Next.js incremental static regeneration and product page architecture to keep content fresh while preserving frontend performance
